titleStmt.title: SII 25.119: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 119. (A.R. No. 119 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the first prākāra in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.

This record may be assigned to c. 14th century on grounds of palaeography. It is dated in the regnal year 46, Kaṟkaṭaka 14. śu 5, Monday, Uttiram (Uttara-Phalguni) which details may correspond to 1342 A.D., July 8. However, the calculated date was actually the 11th solar Kaṟkaṭaka and not the 14th as given in the record.

This epigraph records the declaration made by the mūlaparushaimahāsabhai of Tirupputtūr in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu, agreeing to give annually a specified quantity of corn on each mā of the land and to confer certain privileges in the temple of Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyaṉār to a certain Periyanāyaṉār alias Vīrālayadēva, a member by the village assembly (avai) of Śūraikkuḍi in Tēṉāṟṟuppōkku in Adaḷaiyūr-nāḍu in order to show their gratitude to him. This Viśālayadēvar is stated to have reconsecrated the deity of the temple and saved the people at the time when the temple was occupied by the encamped Muhammadans (tuḷukkar) ‘whose time it was’ and the village and the temple have been ruined. In consequance of this, the inhabitants of Tirupputtūr become unsettled.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[svastiśrī ko] ccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrī virapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 6vatu kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu 10 4lā tiyati
[pūṟuvapakṣa]ttu pañcamiyum somavāramum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ keraḷaciṅkavaḷa nāṭṭu brahmadeyan tirupputtūr mula parṣamarmahāsa
bhaiyom Atalaiyūr nāṭṭut teṉāṟṟuppokku cūraikkuṭi Avaiyaṉ periyanāyaṉārāṉa vicālayatevaṟku piṭipāṭu paṇ
ṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Uṭaiyār tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyanār koyilile tulukkar Iruppār yūruṅ koyilum Aḻikaiyāl Iṉāḷile nāyanā
raiyum Ēṟiyaruḷappaṇṇi Eṅkaḷaiyum rakṣikkaiyil Eṅkaḷ priyattāle candrādityavaṟcelvamāka nāṅkaḷ kuṭuttapaṭi Eṅka
ḷur mukkātavaṭṭattukku Uḷḷum viḷainta nilattukku vāymaṭaippaṭi kol kuṭitāṅkiyāl nilam Orumāvukku talaiyatu
cumaiyāka Oru kūṭṭuc cūṭum māttāl varakukku talaicumai kaṭṭa Oṉṟum varicaipaṭi viḷainta Eḷḷukkum tiṉaikkum
māttāl Eḷḷu patakku māttāl tiṉai mukkuṟuṇiyum ceytoṟum kuruppatāka candrādityavaṟ cella kal
veṭṭi kuṭuttom mula parṣamahāsabhaiyom Aruḷāl Āyiratteḻunūṟṟuvamuventiraveḷān Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 25.119 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
